hero.title: Eva Montes
hero.lead: A delicate, intense and elegant artistic proposal with a contemporary identity.
biography.title: Early Talent
biography.description: Eva Montes began her musical training at the age of 6 with the violin, showing remarkable talent from a very early age that led her, at 11, to start composing her own pieces. Her interpretative ability stands out on both violin and piano, establishing her as a young musician of great versatility. Throughout her journey she has been part of prestigious orchestral ensembles such as the Jove Orquestra de Ponent, the Orquestra Julià Carbonell, the Orquestra Simfònica Juvenil de Catalunya and the Orquestra En Clave de Arts, experiences that have contributed to her artistic and stage development. In the creative field, she has been recognised for three consecutive years with the composition award at the Certamen de Jóvenes Creadores del Liceu, consolidating her profile as an emerging author. In 2025, her talent as a singer-songwriter was also recognised nationally when she received the Mil Descobreix award in Xàtiva. In addition to her instrumental and compositional work, she has stage experience performing her own songs and exploring a wide range of styles including pop, rock, jazz and lyrical music, reflecting her artistic sensitivity and adaptability.
awards.items.0.title: Winner of Mil Descobreix 2025 in Xàtiva, Valencia
awards.items.0.description: Outstanding recognition in the field of young talent.
awards.items.1.title: “Maestro Alonso” Piano Award, July 2024 in Segovia
awards.items.1.description: Winner of the first prize from the Asociación Legado Maestro Alonso for her performance of “Pilarcita”.
awards.items.2.title: Awarded at Joves Creadors Liceu for three consecutive years: 2024, 2025 and 2026
awards.items.2.description: Participation and recognition in the young creators programme linked to the Liceu in Barcelona.
awards.items.3.title: Third prize for her vocal performance in the “Joves Interprets Musicals” competition in Andorra 2026
awards.items.3.description: Recognition obtained in the young musical performers competition in Andorra.
awards.items.4.title: Honourable mention in singing at Sant Anastasi 2026
awards.items.4.description: Honorary recognition in the lyrical singing speciality.
awards.items.5.title: First place in the Academica International Studies Song Competition 2026
awards.items.5.description: International award for her composition and vocal performance.
